nasb.text: and with every living creature that is with you, the birds, the cattle, and every beast of the earth with you; of all that comes out of the ark, even every beast of the earth.

esv.text: and with every living creature that is with you, the birds, the livestock, and every beast of the earth with you, as many as came out of the ark; it is for every beast of the earth.

cnv.text: 並且與所有跟你們在一起有生命的活物立約，包括飛鳥、牲畜和所有地上的走獸，就是與從方舟裡出來的立約。

ccb.text: 以及所有和你们在一起、从方舟出来的飞禽走兽和牲畜等各种动物立约。

csbs.text: 并与所有和你们在一起的生物，包括飞鸟、牲畜和地上一切的活物，就是与所有从方舟里出来的地上活物立约。
